description: Fired when a user opens a discount detail (side panel on desktop, full page on mobile). Captures the merchant, provider, category, and percent.
Fired when the user switches between 'Mis tarjetas' and 'Todas' scopes on the home page.
Fired when the user selects a category chip filter on the home page.
Fired when the user clicks the 'Ver más' button to load more discounts.
Fired when the user enters a non-empty query in the search overlay and results are rendered. Captures the query and number of results.
Fired when the user clicks on a search result link in the search overlay.
Fired when the user selects or deselects a card tier in Ajustes. Captures the bank key, tier index, and the new toggled state (selected/deselected).
Fired when the user clicks 'Verificar vigencia en el sitio de …' — the highest-intent action indicating they are about to redeem the discount.
